headlines.description: — With a flair for improvisation, Taylor Heinicke has been pulling off these sort of bizarre plays most of his life.
headlines.shortLinkText: Houdini Heinicke: Washington beats Falcons 34-30 on late TD

headlines.description: — Defensive end Jerry Hughes and the Buffalo Bills' defense made it clear from the beginning.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bills force 5 turnovers, overwhelm Mills and Texans 40-0

headlines.description: — Justin Fields took some inspiration from Russell Wilson and flashed the skills that made him the No. 11 overall pick in the draft.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fields, Bears bounce back to beat winless Lions 24-14

headlines.description: — Ezekiel Elliott and the Dallas Cowboys ran over the NFL's No. 1 defense, answering a little history from the legs of Carolina quarterback Sam Darnold.
headlines.shortLinkText: Elliott, Cowboys run over top defense, beat Panthers 36-28

headlines.description: — The last seven times Carson Wentz had played in a football game, he had walked off on the losing side. His final four appearances with Philadelphia last season, all losses. His first three appearances with Indianapolis this season, all losses.
headlines.shortLinkText: Colts get 1st win of season, top sputtering Dolphins 27-17

headlines.description: — After winning the NFL's Coach of the Year award in his first season with Cleveland, Kevin Stefanski now has a victory over his old team in Minnesota to highlight the start of his second year.
headlines.shortLinkText: In Stefanski's return, Browns defense dominates Vikings 14-7

events.name: New York Giants at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Daniel Jones and the indefatigable New York Giants faced down deafening crowd noise in the Superdome, erased an 11-point deficit in the fourth quarter and broke into the win column in a game fittingly decided on the final play.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jones, Barkley lead Giants past Saints, 27-21 in OT

events.name: Tennessee Titans at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Robert Saleh had just gotten soaked from a celebratory Gatorade bath when he turned to Zach Wilson after earning their first NFL victory together.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jets get first win, top Titans 27-24 in OT on Bullock's miss

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Philadelphia Eagles

headlines.description: — Patrick Mahomes, Tyreek Hill and the Kansas City Chiefs gave Andy Reid a record-setting homecoming.
headlines.shortLinkText: Patrick Mahomes throws 5 TD passes, Chiefs beat Eagles 42-30

events.name: Arizona Cardinals at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — In every quarter of a dominant victory on the Rams' home turf, Kyler Murray and the Arizona Cardinals confirmed they're no longer the annual afterthought in the NFC West.
headlines.shortLinkText: Murray keeps Cardinals unbeaten with 37-20 rout of Rams

headlines.description: — Russell Wilson spun away from a sack and delivered a perfect strike for another TD pass.
— Lamar Jackson won this one with his right arm. He used his quick feet to crown Baltimore's 23-7 thumping of the Denver Broncos and tie an NFL rushing record.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ravens knock Broncos from unbeaten ranks with 23-7 rout

events.name: Pittsburgh Steelers at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — Randall Cobb demonstrated why Aaron Rodgers wanted the veteran receiver back in Green Bay.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rodgers-Cobb connection helps Packers beat Steelers 27-17

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — Tom Brady brought two decades of touchdown passes, victories and championships to New England.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tom Brady beats Patriots in New England return, 19-17
